title: pilosella thaliana
intro: Pilosella thaliana, also known as Mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella thaliana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Pilosella thaliana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
